memoryArtifacts.headline: Biographical Wikipedia Article
memoryArtifacts.description:
Sir Patrick Hepburn of Dunsyre, 1st Lord Hailes (died 1483) was the feudal lord of Hailes and its castle in East Lothian and a Lord of Parliament.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes於大約1412年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安海利斯時，他的父親Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire31歲，母親Lady Janet DeBorthwick25歲。他於1426年與Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾普雷斯頓吉可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1482年12月6日之後在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾海利斯 卡素，埋葬在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes于大约1412年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安海利斯时，他的父亲Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire31岁，母亲Lady Janet DeBorthwick25岁。他于1426年与Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾普雷斯頓吉可结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1482年12月6日之后在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾海利斯 卡素，埋葬在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Hepburn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham) and Scottish: habitational name from Hepburn in Chillingham (Northumberland), Hebron (Northumberland), or Hebburn in Jarrow (Durham). The placenames probably all derive from Old English hēah ‘high’ + byrgen ‘burial place, tumulus’. Compare Hebron .

variants.name: Eborn
meanings: English (Middlesex, Buckinghamshire, and Oxfordshire): variant of Eburne, itself a possible variant of Hepburn . However, the placename Hepburn comes from northeastern England, and the H- spellings are a late development, which reinforces the suspicion that the name may have a different but unknown derivation.

variants.name: Hebron
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Hebron (Northumberland), possibly from Old English hēah ‘high’ + byrgen ‘burial place, tumulus’. See also Hepburn .
Czech: from the Biblical placename (II Samuel 2: 1-3), said to mean ‘alliance’ in Hebrew.

variants.name: Heyburn
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost or unidentified place, probably in southern England, named with an unknown first element + Old English burna ‘spring, stream’.
Irish (Ulster): possibly a variant of Scottish   Hepburn  .

nameMeanings.name: Patrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name of the apostle and patron saint of Ireland ( c.389–461 ), Gaelic Pádraig. He was a Christian Briton and a Roman citizen, who as a young man was captured and enslaved by raiders from Ireland. He escaped and went to Gaul before returning home to Britain. In about 419 he felt a call to do missionary work in Ireland. He studied for twelve years at Auxerre, and in 432 returned to Ireland. For the rest of his life it is difficult to distinguish fact from fiction. He apparently went to the court of the high kings at Tara and made some converts there; then he travelled around Ireland making further converts until about 445 , when he established his archiepiscopal see at Armagh. By the time of his death almost the whole of Ireland is said to have been converted to Christianity. He is also credited with codifying the laws of Ireland. In his Latin autobiography, as well as in later tradition, his name appears as Patricius ‘patrician’ (i.e. belonging to the Roman senatorial or noble class), but this may actually represent a Latinized form of some lost Celtic (British) name. In Ireland in particular, it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes was born about 1412, in Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland, his father, Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire, was 31 and his mother, Lady Janet DeBorthwick, was 25. He married Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy in 1426, in Prestonkirk, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. He died after 6 December 1482, in Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, and was buried in Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes est né environ 1412, à Hailes, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Janet DeBorthwick, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy en 1426, à Prestonkirk, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé après 6 décembre 1482, à Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, et a été enterré à Haddingtonshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes um 1412 in Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire 31 und seine Mutter Lady Janet DeBorthwick 25. Er hat 1426 in Prestonkirk, Haddingtonshire, Scotland Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb nach 6. Dezember 1482 in Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland und wurde in Haddingtonshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes è nato il circa 1412 nel Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lady Janet DeBorthwick, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy nel 1426, nel Prestonkirk, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 7 figlie. Morì dopo il 6 dicembre 1482, nel Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, e fu sepolto a Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailesが約1412年にスコットランドミドロスアンヘイレスで生まれた時，父Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshireは31歳，母Lady Janet DeBorthwickは25歳であった。1426年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアプレストンキルクでEllen Wallace of Auchinbothyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1482年12月6日以後にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアヘイレス カストルで死去し，スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes(이)가 대략 1412년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 하일레스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Janet DeBorthwick(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1426년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 플레스토커크에서 Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1482년 12월 6일 이후 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 하일레스 카스틀에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 하딩토실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes nasceu aproximadamente 1412, em Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Janet DeBorthwick, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy em 1426, em Prestonkirk, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu após 6 de dezembro de 1482, em Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, e foi sepultado em Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes родился около 1412 г. в местности хеилесь, мидлотян, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Janet DeBorthwick, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy в 1426 г. в местности престонкирк, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер после 6 декабрь 1482 г. в местности хеилесь кастл, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия и был похоронен в местности хаддингтоншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes nació aproximadamente 1412, en Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady Janet DeBorthwick, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy en 1426, en Prestonkirk, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió después de 6 de diciembre de 1482, en Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, y fue sepultado en Haddingtonshire, Scotland.
